_comment: Machine queue derived from ROADMAP.md (ROADMAP = human truth, this = derived index). Orchestrator reads this + progress.json. Grow module-by-module as the build proceeds. Schema per task: id, module, title, spec, req, verify (shell, run in worktree root, exit 0 = pass), commit, depends_on, needs_review (halts for human review before commit), files (hints for the worker).

tasks.title: Card frontmatter schema + fixtures
tasks.spec: Write agentdb/kb/schema-card.js exporting validateCard(frontmatterObject) -> {ok:boolean, errors:string[]} for the SUPERPROMPT §5.1 schema (id/title/status/priority/project/assignee/parent/depends_on/tags/est_commits/parallel_safe/created_at/updated_at). NOTE: 'blocks' is NOT a field (D6 — derived). status enum: triage|backlog|todo|in_progress|blocked|review|done. Add fixtures agentdb/test/fixtures/good.card.md + bad-status.card.md (raw files for later parser use; the M0-1 TEST validates JS objects, not raw files — parsing is M1-1).
tasks.req: REQ-M0-1: schema accepts a good object and rejects a bad-status object with a field-specific error.

tasks.title: Status enum + transition map + WIP
tasks.spec: Extend agentdb/kb/schema-card.js (or a new agentdb/kb/status.js) with a legal-transition map for the status enum and WIP limit on in_progress (default 3, env KANBAN_WIP). legalTransition(from,to)->bool; wipLimit()->number.
tasks.req: REQ-M0-2: illegal transitions (e.g. done->in_progress) rejected; WIP read from env with fallback 3.

tasks.title: Layout convention + discover stub
tasks.spec: agentdb/kb/discover.js: findCards(root) -> sorted .card.md paths under root, ignoring node_modules/.git/.index. Doc the layout Projects/<proj>/.kanban/{roadmap.md,cards/*.card.md,topics/} in a header comment.
tasks.req: REQ-M0-3: discovers N cards in a fixture tree; ignores node_modules/.git.

tasks.title: Hand-rolled frontmatter+body parser
tasks.spec: Create agentdb/kb/parse.js: parseCardFile(path) -> {file, frontmatter, body}. Split '---' YAML frontmatter from markdown body; parse the §5.1 subset only (scalars, [a,b] inline arrays, 'key:' block lists). Return the frontmatter as a JS object the M0-1 schema expects. Zero deps (decision D3). Also write agentdb/kb/parse.test.js using the fixtures from M0-1 (good.card.md parses to a valid object; bad-status.card.md parses to an object whose status fails schema validation).
tasks.req: REQ-M1-1: good.card.md parses to the exact frontmatter object M0-1's validateCard accepts; arrays (depends_on, tags) parse correctly.

tasks.title: Workspace-wide discovery
tasks.spec: Extend agentdb/kb/discover.js (created in M0-3) with findCardsWorkspace(roots) that walks ~/Projects/*/.kanban/cards/ (plus env KANBAN_ROOTS extras) -> full sorted, deduped inventory of .card.md paths. Keep the single-root findCards(root) from M0-3 working. Update agentdb/kb/discover.test.js to cover both.
tasks.req: REQ-M1-2: over a 2-project fixture tree, findCardsWorkspace returns the right count and order, deduped.

tasks.title: Validator with file:line errors
tasks.spec: Create agentdb/kb/validate.js: validateCardFile(path) -> {ok, errors[]} using parse.js (M1-1) + schema-card.js (M0-1). Each error carries file:line so a human/agent can fix it. validateTree(root) validates every discovered card. Exit !=0 from a CLI helper on any invalid card.
tasks.req: REQ-M1-3: a tree with one bad card reports it precisely (file:line) and returns ok=false; a clean tree returns ok=true.
tasks.commit: feat(kanban): card validator w/ file:line errors (M1-3)
